fingerprint_string: Exclusively uses alloy steel with black oxide finish across all fasteners, with roughly balanced preference for metric and imperial threading systems.
notable_patterns: 100% consistent use of alloy steel with black oxide finish across all 18 orders
Orders mix of structural fasteners (hex cap screws, nuts) and assembly hardware (lock washers, flat washers)
Repeat ordering of specific items like 5/8-11 lock washers indicates standardized assembly processes
Quantity patterns suggest both production runs (high quantities of washers/nuts) and maintenance inventory (smaller quantities of specialty items)
